name: What's the process after forklift runs over foot at work?
description: Treat, report, file, settle with lawyer help.

mainEntity.name: What's the process after forklift runs over foot at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Treat, report, file, settle with lawyer help.
acceptedAnswer.description: Medical > report > file comp > treat > settle/award.[5] Context: 6-12 months typical. Key factors: Authorized doctors only. Practical guidance: Attorney manages paperwork; avoids pitfalls. Stay compliant.
